etymology.interpretation: đ ¬ť originally depicted the concept of serving or subduing. When ĺ‡ˇ(ĺ‡ˇ) (fĂˇn, 'tray') was added, it contributed to the meaning of serving or submitting, while đ ¬ť provided the phonetic component. This later evolved into the character ćśŤ.
